title: Oil prices bounce off lows, as an Iran peace deal may be just a ‘structured pause’
body: Global oil prices fell by as much as 12% Wednesday, then pared nearly half of those losses as the market weighed reports of progress toward a U.S.-Iran peace deal and the potential impact on the growing crude-supply crisis in the Persian Gulf.

title: U.S. Treasury Yields Fall But Direction for Long-End Yields Still Seen Upward
body: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield fell and ING said the the long end of the Treasury curve will continue trading at higher yields even as Trump hasn’t delivered anything to shock markets so far.

title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
body: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

title: If stocks are to continue rising, energy prices need to start falling, Barclays says
body: Markets are displaying a dangerous degree of complacency, Barclays argues. To justify and build on recent equity market ebullience, risk appetite needs a resolution in the Middle East.

title: Stocks are losing their edge over bonds, in an ominous sign for the market
body: The extra return that investors receive for the additional risk of owning stocks over bonds has been fading, and that is making some on Wall Street nervous that investors might be too complacent about the stock market’s recent rally.

title: Natural-Gas Firm Diversified Energy Strikes Deal for Permian Basin Player
body: Maverick Natural Resources has operations in Texas and Oklahoma.

title: The Extra Reward for Owning Stocks Over Bonds Has Disappeared
body: There is little sign of crimped demand for equities among individual investors, who remain bullish after two years of blockbuster gains.

title: These are the fastest-growing jobs for new college graduates — even in this low-hire market
body: The post-inflation job market has been especially hard for new grads, but there are ways they can help themselves prepare for the search.
